description: Vigilant's nginx reverse-proxies the Wanderer mapper via a shared external Docker network named `web`. This footgun has bitten the deploy twice. Add a preflight to `scripts/deploy.sh` that verifies `docker network inspect web` succeeds AND that `external: true, name: web` is set in compose; abort the deploy with a clear error message if either is missing. Also reload nginx by recreating the nginx container after any nginx/*.conf change (bind-mount inode trap).
title: Preflight external `web` network check in deploy.sh
